content:
Item 10: Directors, Executive Officers and Corporate Governance
Except for the information regarding executive officers required by Item 401 of Regulation S-K, we incorporate the information required by this item by reference to our definitive proxy statement for our [DATE_TIME] meeting of shareholders. We refer to this proxy statement as the [DATE_TIME] Proxy Statement.
The term of office of each of our executive officers continues until his successor is selected and qualified or until his earlier death, resignation or removal. The following table sets forth information concerning our executive officers, including their ages, positions and tenure, as of [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] has served as a director and as our President, Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer for [DATE_TIME]. As of [DATE_TIME], Mr. [PERSON] had sole voting power over approximately 331/3% of the combined voting power of our two classes of common stock. He is a son of our late founder, Mr. [PERSON].
[PERSON] has served as the Chief Financial Officer of Comcast Corporation since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to joining our company, Mr. [PERSON] had been Co-President and Co-Chief Operating Officer for The Carlyle Group, a global investment firm, since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, Mr. [PERSON] was the Co-Chief Executive Officer of the Corporate & Investment Bank of JPMorgan Chase & Co. from [DATE_TIME] until [DATE_TIME]; the Chief Executive Officer of JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Treasury & Securities Services business from [DATE_TIME]; and the Chief Financial Officer of JPMorgan Chase & Co. from [DATE_TIME] to 2010.
[PERSON] has served as the Chief Executive Officer of NBCUniversal since [DATE_TIME]. Previously, Mr. [PERSON] was the Chairman of NBCUniversal Film and Entertainment since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, Mr. [PERSON] served as the Chairman of Universal Filmed Entertainment Group (UFEG) since [DATE_TIME] and Chairman of NBCUniversal International prior to joining [PERSON]. Prior to joining NBCUniversal, Mr. [PERSON] served as President of Comcast Programming Group for [DATE_TIME]. Prior to joining our company, Mr. [PERSON] was the CEO of Gemstar TV Guide International and President of FOX Cable Networks Group.
[PERSON] has served as Chief Administration Officer of Comcast since [DATE_TIME] and Executive Vice President of NBCUniversal since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to joining our company, Mr. [PERSON] was President of The Abernathy MacGregor Group, a leading strategic communications firm headquartered in [LOCATION].
[PERSON] has served as Chief Executive Officer, Comcast Cable since [DATE_TIME] and previously had served as Chief Operating Officer, Comcast Cable for [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] is also a director of Amkor Technology, Inc.
[PERSON] has served as our Chief Legal Officer and Secretary since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to joining our company, Mr. [PERSON] had served as the Chairman and Managing Partner of Davis Polk & Wardwell LLP, a global law firm, since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, Mr. [PERSON] was a partner at Davis Polk & Wardwell LLP from [DATE_TIME] and a Managing Director in the Investment Banking Division of Morgan Stanley from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] has served as an Executive Vice President since [DATE_TIME], our Chief Accounting Officer since [DATE_TIME] and our [PERSON] since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to joining our company, Mr. [PERSON] had been with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission where he served as the Deputy Chief Accountant in the agency’s Office of the Chief Accountant since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, he was Deloitte & Touche’s Audit/Industry Professional Practice Director for media and entertainment.
Item 11:
